dialogue_text: Fly, Sola! Dejah Thoris remains to die with the man she loves.
source_excerpt: She sprang quickly from the thoat and, throwing her dear arms about my neck, turned to Sola, saying with quiet dignity: "Fly, Sola! Dejah Thoris remains to die with the man she loves."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
